caption: A person is presenting a digital mind map via a screen-sharing application. The main screen displays a dark background with various colorful icons and nodes connected by blue lines, featuring labels such as "food systems", "Food systems", and "Invisible Food". A large graphic of a red magnet attracting a small grey figure is superimposed over the center of the mind map. At the top of the browser window, multiple tabs are open, including ones titled "Kumo", "Insights | Introduction to Kumo", and "Rural Community Food System". In the upper right corner, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark shirt and grey over-ear headphones, looking toward the screen. The scene remains static across the frames, with no visible movement from the person or changes to the digital content on the screen.
